title: adenodolichos helenae
intro: Adenodolichos helenae, also known as Helen's dolichos, is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in Africa and Asia. It is a type of legume that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenodolichos helenae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, with dried roots and leaves being commonly used in traditional medicine.
